result.stdout:
efcpt.10 10.1.1195-nightly+68050a657fe05555e3040c9e9be53a19baf62f5a
Copyright (c) ErikEJ 2023 - https://github.com/ErikEJ/EFCorePowerTools

  -o, --output           Root output folder, defaults to current directory

  -i, --input            Full pathname to the efcpt-config.json file, default is
                         'efcpt-config.json' in currrent directory

  -r, --renamer          Full pathname to the efpt.renaming.json file, default
                         is 'efpt.renaming.json' in currrent directory

  -v, --verbose          Provide more detailed output

  --help                 Display this help screen.

  --version              Display version information.

  connection (pos. 0)    Required. ADO.NET connection string for the source
                         database (or .dacpac path)

  provider (pos. 1)      Name of EF Core provider, or use an abbreviation
                         (mssql, postgres, sqlite, oracle, mysql, firebird,
                         snowflake). May not be required, as an attempt is made
                         to resolve the provider from the connection string.


SAMPLES:
  efcpt "Data Source=.;Initial Catalog=Chinook;User=sa;Pwd=123"
  efcpt "/temp/mydb.dacpac" mssql
  efcpt "Server=my.database.windows.net;Authentication=Active Directory
  Default;Database=myddb;User Id=user@domain.com;" mssql
